Wouldnt it be more fun if ye went to a raid and suddenly saw an item drop that ye didnt know something about, like it would be a surprise. To know everything sometimes spoil the fun.

# Jul 14 2001 at 3:11 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361502777
41 posts
well yes FoH was passing up a lot more info in the past, but i don´t think they will go on with that.
Public envy and ******** about items most are nowhere near to be able to aquire has been a reason for major nerfs in the past.
Furor has stated to put an end to this by giving out less to zero info on those items in the future.. at least not to public forums. I am sure the uber guilds do share knowledge there.
▲ Page top
RE: !
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2003 at 11:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760853842
2 posts
I smell ****. You guys need to get lives and stop worrying about things as stupid as the effect that peoples item posting will have... which seems pretty neurotic to me. If sony created the item then theres no reason it should be kept a secret. Boycott Allakhazam's message boards until they remove all item information on nice gear. Or have a friendly neighborhood book burning
▲ Page top
RE: !
QuoteReply
# Jul 13 2001 at 11:55 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965790794
328 posts
I'm not disrespecting AfterLife (I've seen info posted from them), but you do have to admit, FoH has passed along much more info than anyone else.

Not comparing guilds, as I'm sure they are both great guilds. And, no, I don't know any of them personally.
▲ Page top
RE: !
QuoteReply
# Jul 16 2001 at 12:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591753880975
139 posts
Honestly, several guilds have made it into the ToV. I play on Mith Marr server, which is where AL plays. Gear like this and others shouldn;t be posted IMO. 99% of the people who play this game will never see it. On the otherhand now those 99% can see it, complain about it, and thus affect it. I mind my own business> I like to drool over things like this like everyone else, but that is as far as it goes. I will be going to ToV in the next few monthes, and would hate to find out a level 10 druid ruined a piece of gear simply because they had a problem with it. Drool away and please leave it at that. As far as uber guilds go, they posted enough finds that everyone knows who the ubers are. If I were them I would keep little gems like this to myself from now till forever.
▲ Page top
RE: !
QuoteReply
# Mar 30 2003 at 2:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782049866
143 posts
Not meaning to come off as flaming, but here goes. 1 - if you stick at it long enough, you will get the levels and what not to make it to the higher end zones, just takes time and patience. 2 - I personally love all of the info about the gear that is posted because it helps me set goals, figure out the best combination of gear that I want and how/when I can do it. 3 - Gives me something to browse through when the servers go down and I have free time.

At one point in time I was like alot of you lower level players, and never thought I would make it in the high end game. Granted, I am only level 52 now, but the high end game isn't far off for me and as long as I keep on getting xp, I will eventually be in the uber high end zones. But the one thing I have found most important in all of EQ, have fun with yer friends. Uber loot and levels are great, but making your guild leader blow pepsi out of his nose from laughing too hard is about the greatest feeling in the world (just don't do it on a raid and when he is the MA, lol).
▲ Page top
Hmm

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 13 2001 at 5:40 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I know this particular item doesn't say FoH, but has anyone else noticed how FoH seems to really be tearing up ToV? They are really inputing some nice stuff for the item dbase. I just want to say thanks FoH, for showing me these items, seeing how nobody else is going to, lol. I think all you people who are anti-FoH need to get a life. So what if they are the uber guild of uber guilds? I say congratulations on making such a great guild. Newayz, thats just my 2cp. Once again, THANKS FoH!!!!!

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 15 2001 at 9:11 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Oh Man hero worship to these guys, truly sad for a bunch of uppity to good to talk to you peons they dont impress me. They just take this GAME way too serious I thanked Verant for the split off Veeshan to leave those tools behind, flame away, FoH is obsessed with this loot and power thing pull the plug and it is a bored ticked off kid. Oh yeah Uber gear guys die just like anybody else just they die in places we will never see or cant see because they are there ahaha. After a while gear is just a change of color and a couple of stats that do matter when you get DT'd lol. Play how ya like just don't worship people for better pixels then yours.
